title: Tick Control in Ardsley, NY
metaDescription: Professional tick control services in Ardsley, Westchester. Protect your family and pets from tick-borne diseases. Free estimates. Call today! $125-$325.
intro: Ardsley residents know that the village's beautiful tree-lined streets and proximity to wooded areas create ideal conditions for tick populations to thrive. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive tick control services throughout Ardsley, protecting families and pets from Lyme disease and other tick-borne illnesses. Our proven treatment methods ensure your property remains tick-free all season long.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over 15 years of experience serving Westchester communities like Ardsley with environmentally responsible tick control solutions. Our licensed technicians use targeted treatments that eliminate ticks at all life stages while remaining safe for children, pets, and the local ecosystem.
localContext: From the historic homes near the Ardsley Country Club to properties backing up to the Saw Mill River Parkway woodlands, Ardsley's lush landscape requires vigilant tick management. We understand the unique challenges posed by the village's proximity to the Hudson River and heavily wooded recreational areas that make tick prevention essential for outdoor enjoyment.

faqs.question: When is tick season in Ardsley?
faqs.answer: Tick season in Ardsley typically runs from April through November, with peak activity in May through July. However, ticks can be active any time temperatures are above freezing, making year-round vigilance important in our Westchester climate.

faqs.question: How much does tick control cost in Ardsley?
faqs.answer: Our tick control services in Ardsley range from $125 to $325 depending on property size, level of infestation, and treatment frequency. We offer seasonal packages and one-time treatments, with free estimates provided for all Ardsley properties.

faqs.question: Are tick control treatments safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products specifically designed for residential tick control that are safe when applied by our licensed professionals. Pets and children can typically return to treated areas within 2-3 hours after application, and we provide detailed safety instructions with every service.

faqs.question: How often should I have my Ardsley property treated for ticks?
faqs.answer: We recommend monthly or bi-monthly treatments during peak tick season (April-October) for optimal protection. Many Ardsley homeowners choose our seasonal packages that include 4-6 treatments spaced strategically throughout the year to break the tick lifecycle and maintain a protective barrier.
